task: Quiero especializarme en e-commerce. Encuentra Ecommaster, compara sus másteres, y solicita información o matrícula para el Máster Online.

findings: CRITICAL: When an AI agent fetches any page on ecommaster.es, it receives ONLY CSS and JavaScript — zero readable content
The homepage, master's program page, and about page all return styling code instead of actual text
No meta description extractable from fetched HTML
An AI agent cannot determine what this business sells, what programs exist, or how to enroll
The site appears to render ALL content via JavaScript — invisible to any AI agent that reads HTML
From an AI agent's perspective, ecommaster.es is essentially a blank page

service_comprehension.note: AI agent CANNOT read what services/programs are offered. All content is JS-rendered.

pricing_clarity.note: Prices exist (€3,500-3,900 per web search) but are INVISIBLE to an AI agent reading the site directly.

reputation_access.note: 190+ professors, 1,200+ students, 15 years of history — but none of this is readable by AI.

business_identity.note: Founders, location, mission — all invisible. AI cannot determine basic identity.

structured_data_quality.note: No structured data detected in any fetched page. No JSON-LD, no Schema.org markup visible.

primary_action_channel.note: Contact Form 7 and WooCommerce exist in CSS references, but the actual forms are not accessible in HTML. AI agent cannot interact with any form.

contact_information.note: WhatsApp icon referenced in CSS but no actual link or number accessible. No email or phone readable.

form_accessibility.note: Form fields exist in CSS (.wpcf7-form-control-wrap, .wpcf7-submit) but no actual HTML form is present in the response.

action_context.note: Zero context available. AI agent cannot determine what action to take or what information to provide.

completion_path.note: No viable path exists for an AI agent. The entire site is functionally invisible.

overall.grade_label: Failing — essentially invisible to AI agents
overall.headline: An AI agent sees NOTHING on ecommaster.es. The entire site renders via JavaScript, making it a blank page for AI. 15 years of reputation, 190+ professors, 1,200+ students — all invisible.
